arts.ttl: Inter Miami CF Predicted Lineup vs. Palmeiras: Herons Try for Round of 16 Berth
arts.sum: The presence of a certain Lionel Messi is perhaps the sole reason why David Beckham’s franchise are involved in the Club World Cup, and the great Argentine was at his majestic best on Matchday 2 in Atlanta to boost his team’s chances of progressing. However, Alba was back in action on Matchday 2 and is set for his first Club World Cup start of the summer.
